---
id: create-instrument
title: "Create a financial instrument"
description: "Creates a PERPETUAL or SHARABLE instrument. Presence of maturityDate determines the group. The details map is validated against the instrument type's JSON Schema."
sidebar_label: "Create a financial instrument"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: reference/api/trms-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Create a financial instrument"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/v1/instruments"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Creates a PERPETUAL or SHARABLE instrument. Presence of maturityDate determines the group. The details map is validated against the instrument type's JSON Schema.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
